content:
Scorpio November 2026 Horoscope and Crystal of the Month

Energy ThemeRefine the self, claim the depth
Key DatesVenus + Mercury station direct Nov 13 (in your sign) / New Moon Nov 8 (Scorpio, 1st house — your sign, birthday New Moon) / Mars conjunct Jupiter Nov 16 (Leo, your 10th) / Gemini Beaver Full Moon Nov 24 (8th house)
LoveVenus stationing direct in your sign releases the love review; the 8th house Full Moon deepens intimacy
CareerMars conjunct Jupiter in your 10th house is one of 2026's loudest career moments — claim the public role
Crystal of the MonthObsidian
Lucky ColorsDeep black, dark crimson, misted burgundy
Lucky Number1
AffirmationI refine the self October surfaced; I claim the depth it carries me to.

This Month's Energy

Scorpio, November 2026 is your birthday New Moon — and Venus and Mercury station direct in your sign. The New Moon in Scorpio on November 8 falls in your 1st house of identity, body, and personal direction — your annual personal restart, the moment to set the tone for your new year. Venus and Mercury both station direct on November 13, releasing October's retrograde season — and both stations are in your sign, so the release is especially meaningful. Then November 16 brings Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53' Leo, your 10th house of career and public role — one of 2026's loudest visibility moments. November 24 brings the Beaver Full Moon in Gemini, your 8th house of intimacy, shared resources, and psychological depth — a climax around a private bond. November's pattern: refine the self early, claim the depth late.

Key Dates for Scorpio in November 2026

DateTransitMeaning for ScorpioDo / Avoid
Nov 8New Moon in Scorpio (your 1st house — birthday New Moon)1st house — your annual personal restart; the new year begins in your signDo: set the tone for the new year, declare the next chapter, refine the self
Avoid: rushing major launches in the days before Venus stations direct (Nov 13)
Nov 13Venus + Mercury station direct (in your sign)Station day — both planets station direct in your 1st house; the retrograde review of identity, self-presentation, and how you show up endsDo: move forward on the identity claim, send the message, claim the look
Avoid: rushing decisions in the 3 days around the station
Nov 16Mars conjunct Jupiter at 25°53' Leo10th house — career, public role, reputation peak; a once-every-two-years amplification of visibility and leadershipDo: claim the title, ship the public work, lead, accept the role
Avoid: hiding from recognition at a once-every-two-years peak
Nov 24Beaver Full Moon in Gemini8th house — climax around intimacy, shared resources, debts, psychological depth; a long-building private bond or shared finance maturesDo: address the intimacy, renegotiate the shared account, deepen the trust
Avoid: power struggles over shared resources at the Full Moon
Nov 22Sun enters Sagittarius2nd house season — money, possessions, body, self-worth through late DecemberDo: organize the finances, refine the budget, address the body's worth
Avoid: conflating self-worth with net worth
Early NovMars moves through Leo (your 10th)Career, public role, reputation stay action zones; the run-up to Nov 16 builds the visibility momentumDo: ship the public work, claim the title, lead
Avoid: waiting for perfect before the public push

Career & Money

For Scorpio, November's career story peaks at Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 10th house. The November 16 conjunction is one of 2026's clearest "step forward and lead" moments — claim the title, ship the public work, accept the role. This is a once-every-two-years visibility peak.

The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 1st house — birthday New Moon) sets the personal tone for the new year. Venus and Mercury stationing direct in your sign on November 13 releases the identity and self-presentation review. The Sun entering Sagittarius (your 2nd house of money) on November 22 opens the income season. The Gemini Full Moon on November 24 (your 8th house) matures shared finance. Crystals for wealth can support the visibility; the practical move is refine the self early, claim the depth late.

Love & Relationships

Venus stationing direct in your sign on November 13 is the love signature of the month — and Venus has been retrograde in Scorpio since October 3, so this release lands with extra weight. The review of how you show up in love ends; the path forward clears.

The Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 falls in your 8th house of intimacy — a climax around a private bond or shared finance. An old depth resurfaces, matured. Mars conjunct Jupiter in your 10th house on November 16 shifts the work-life balance — the role meets the bond. Crystals for love can support the reopening; the deeper practice is refining the self so the depth can be honest.

Health & Wellness

November's wellness story emphasizes the reproductive organs, pelvis, and endocrine system. The Scorpio New Moon on November 8 (your 1st house — birthday New Moon) is the year's biggest wellness reset for Scorpio — set the rhythm for the new year.

Obsidian, your crystal of the month, is traditionally associated with grounding, protection, truth-telling, and the release of old emotional patterns — a useful symbolic companion for a Mars/Pluto-ruled water sign at a birthday New Moon. Scorpio often carries tension in the reproductive organs, pelvis, and endocrine system; warm baths, rest, and gentle movement are especially helpful. This is lifestyle guidance, not medical advice; persistent concerns belong with a clinician.

Crystal of the Month: Obsidian

Why Obsidian fits Scorpio this month. You are Mars- and Pluto-ruled — your reflex is depth, transformation, the truth beneath the surface. November is your birthday month, with a personal New Moon and two direct stations in your sign. Obsidian — volcanic glass, deep black — is traditionally tied to truth-telling, protection, and the release of old patterns. Where Malachite would transform and Black Tourmaline would shield, Obsidian cuts through to clarity. Perfect for the 1st house birthday New Moon (refine the self) and the 8th house Gemini Full Moon (claim the depth).

How to use it during November 2026. Place Obsidian on your nightstand or at your front door on November 8 (the birthday New Moon). Carry it during any intimacy or career conversation through November 24.

Best date to use it: November 24, the Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 8th house — hold Obsidian at your root for 5 minutes at moonrise, naming the depth you're claiming after the birthday reset.

Read more: Obsidian Meaning and Best Crystals for Scorpio.

Monthly Crystal Ritual for Scorpio — November 2026

When: November 24, the Gemini Beaver Full Moon in your 8th house.
Crystal: Obsidian.
Intention: Refine the self the birthday began; claim the depth it carries.

  1. Cleanse Obsidian under cool running water for 30 seconds on the morning of November 8 (the birthday New Moon). Place it on your nightstand or at your front door through November 8.
  2. Set the intention between the New Moon and the Full Moon (November 8–24): write down three pieces of self you're refining — and the depth you're ready to claim at the Full Moon.
  3. Act at the Beaver Full Moon on November 24: address the intimacy, renegotiate the shared account, claim the depth. Obsidian in your pocket during the act.
  4. Reflect at the Scorpio Full Moon in May 2027 (your 1st house): how has the new self matured through the winter? Hold Obsidian during the review.

Shop Scorpio Crystals for November 2026

Want to build your monthly crystal toolkit? Explore the full Scorpio crystal guide for stones connected with depth, truth, protection, and transformation — including the Obsidian that cuts through to clarity at a birthday New Moon. Every stone is genuine, ethically sourced, and real — not dyed, not glass.

Frequently Asked Questions — Scorpio November 2026

Is November 2026 a good month for Scorpio?

It's your birthday month — and a powerful one. The New Moon on November 8 is in your sign (your annual personal restart). Venus and Mercury both station direct in your sign on November 13, releasing October's review. The Mars conjunct Jupiter on November 16 (your 10th house) is one of 2026's biggest career moments.

How will Venus stationing direct in my sign affect Scorpio on November 13?

Venus has been retrograde in Scorpio since October 3 — its station direct in your sign on November 13 (alongside Mercury) is a powerful release of the identity and self-presentation review. How you show up in love, beauty, and partnership can finally move forward.

What does the Gemini Beaver Full Moon on November 24 mean for Scorpio?

It falls in your 8th house of intimacy, shared resources, and psychological depth — a climax around a private bond or shared finance. Address the intimacy; renegotiate the shared account; deepen the trust.

What is the best crystal for Scorpio in November 2026?

Obsidian — it cuts through to clarity at a birthday New Moon, exactly what a 1st house Scorpio New Moon (refine the self) plus an 8th house Gemini Full Moon (claim the depth) demand. See the full Scorpio crystal guide →

Why is the Mars conjunct Jupiter in my 10th house so significant for Scorpio?

The November 16 conjunction in your 10th house of career and public role is a once-every-two-years amplification of visibility, leadership, and recognition. Claim the title; ship the public work; lead.
